dest.heroSubtitle: Find your next unforgettable journey from our curated collection of extraordinary places around the globe.

tour_detail.day1Desc: Private airport pickup. Check-in and enjoy an intimate welcome dinner with our local guide.
tour_detail.day2Desc: Visit famous heritage sites with skip-the-line privileges. Lunch at a Michelin-starred restaurant.
tour_detail.day3Desc: Relax at a world-class Spa or enjoy free time shopping. Join the farewell gala dinner on a luxury yacht in the evening.
tour_detail.storiesSub: Hear from those who have experienced it
tour_detail.review1Text: "Exceeded my expectations. Everything was seamlessly arranged and perfect down to the smallest detail."
tour_detail.review2Text: "The local guides made a complete difference. We felt like guests in their own home."
tour_detail.freeCancellation: Free cancellation 30 days prior to departure.
tour_detail.selectPackageDesc: Select a package that suits your needs. Each package includes different services and pricing.
tour_detail.chooseDateForPrice: Select a date to see exact pricing
tour_detail.noSchedule: No departure schedule yet. Contact us for consultation.
tour_detail.cancelPolicyBadgeSub: Book with confidence — full refund if plans change within the first 24 hours.
tour_detail.cancelPolicyNote: * Policy may vary by tour program. Contact our hotline for detailed advice before booking.
tour_detail.defaultAge: All ages welcome. Children under 5 are free.
tour_detail.defaultDress: Comfortable clothing. Modest attire required when visiting temples.
tour_detail.defaultBring: Valid ID / Passport, sunscreen, personal medication, swimwear.
tour_detail.defaultHealth: No specific health requirements. Please inform us of any special needs.
tour_detail.defaultAccessibility: Partially accessible. Contact us for detailed arrangements.

reviews.title: Azure Horizon Reviews
reviews.successMessage: Thank you for sharing your experience!
reviews.noReviewsYet: No reviews yet. Be the first to experience this!
reviews.errorSubmit: Failed to submit review. Please try again.

tailor.subtitle: Share your vision with our expert travel designers. We will curate a bespoke itinerary that transcends your expectations.
tailor.formSubtitle: Please complete the details below. A dedicated concierge will contact you within 24 hours.
tailor.whereTo: WHERE DO YOU WANT TO GO?
tailor.when: WHEN ARE YOU PLANNING TO TRAVEL?
tailor.dreamTrip: TELL US MORE ABOUT YOUR DREAM TRIP
tailor.dreamTripPlaceholder: Share your passions, interests, and any specific requirements...
tailor.submitNote: By submitting, you agree to our concierge privacy terms.
tailor.submitAlert: Form submitted successfully! Our Concierge will contact you soon.
tailor.satisfaction: Member Satisfaction for Tailor-made Journeys in 2025
tailor.signatureDesc: Each tailor-made journey is assigned a personal specialist who handles every logistical detail, from private aviation and villa procurement to exclusive access to world-renowned museums and culinary legends.
